aiWatermarkActionFailed: Action failed. Please try again later.
aiWatermarkAgreementBody: Upon your application, the Platform may provide you with AI-generated content without explicit labels. If you subsequently use online information dissemination services to publish AI-generated content, please note that you must proactively declare and use the labeling features provided by the distribution platform. You understand and agree that if you fail to add explicit labels to AI-generated content as required by laws and regulations, resulting in public confusion or misidentification, you shall bear all consequences and responsibilities arising therefrom.
aiWatermarkAgreementIntro: In accordance with legal and regulatory requirements, the Super Magic AI Platform ("Platform") provides AI generation and synthesis services that may cause public confusion or misidentification. The Platform shall add explicit labels to AI-generated content to inform the public.
aiWatermarkDisabledDescription: The download menu keeps its current two-option structure. Clicking "Download Unwatermarked Image" will continue using the original behavior, with agreement confirmation performed in that flow.
aiWatermarkEnabledDescription: The global agreement is active. Covered download entries will directly perform unwatermarked download, and the menu will collapse to a single "Download Image" button.
aiWatermarkInactiveDescription: The historical agreement state is preserved, but the current account does not have unwatermarked download entitlement, so this setting is temporarily inactive. Once upgraded again, the current state will continue to apply.
aiWatermarkSubtitle: View and manage the agreement state for AI unwatermarked downloads
aiWatermarkToggleDescription: After enabling the watermark removal option, AI-generated content created or produced by your current account will no longer include visible watermarks.
aiWatermarkVipDescription: Your current plan is personal unpaid. Please upgrade before configuring the AI unwatermarked download agreement.
allPointsIncluded: Includes All Points, Both Free And Paid
creator: Creator
dataExportSubtitle: Manage local data and exported content
loginDevicesSubtitle: View and manage logged in devices
myAccountSubtitle: View Current Account Information, Subscription Content, And Remaining Points.
nextCycleDistributionInfo: Check The Points Issuance Time For The Next Subscription Cycle.
recordingHistoryDescription: View, export, or clean up locally stored recording sessions

recordingHistoryPanel.deleteDescription: This cannot be undone. Uploaded audio chunks and server data are not affected.
recordingHistoryPanel.description: Keeps recording sessions started in the last {{days}} days. Export creates a zip with session.json, note.md, and transcript.md.
recordingHistoryPanel.emptyDescription: No recording sessions were started in the last {{days}} days, or the data has been cleaned up.
recordingHistoryPanel.title: Recording Session History
recordingHistoryPanel.toastCleanupNone: No expired sessions to clean up
